visual_description: A woman with short brown hair, wearing a white lab coat over a striped shirt, sits on the edge of a hospital bed with pink sheets. She looks to her right and speaks, then turns her head forward and continues talking. A medical monitor and a pink basin are visible on a bedside table.
audio_description: A woman speaks in a calm, professional tone, asking if someone is ready to go to the delivery room. Her voice is clear and steady.
